title: Oscar's Morning Sounds
synopsis: Baby Oscar wakes up to the gentle sounds of a lazy Sunday morning with his family, discovering all the wonderful noises that make home feel warm and loving.

pages.text: Oscar wakes up! The sun is bright. What sounds does Oscar hear?

illustration.description: Oscar, a toddler with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes, sits up in his crib wearing soft blue pajamas. Golden morning sunlight streams through the window, casting warm light across his nursery. His arms are stretched up in a morning yawn.
illustration.alt: Oscar waking up in his sunny nursery

pages.text: Sizzle, sizzle! Mama makes pancakes in the kitchen. Pop, pop! Daddy makes coffee.

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes toddles into a sunlit kitchen where his diverse family is cooking. Steam rises from pancakes on the griddle and coffee pot. Everyone wears cozy pajamas in the golden morning light.
illustration.alt: Family cooking breakfast together in pajamas

pages.text: Rustle, rustle! Big sister reads the newspaper. Purr, purr! The cat is happy.

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes sits on the floor next to his older sister who's reading newspaper pages. A content orange cat purrs nearby. Soft Sunday morning light fills the cozy living room as the family relaxes in their pajamas.
illustration.alt: Oscar with sister reading newspaper and purring cat

pages.text: Giggle, giggle! Oscar laughs at all the sounds. Home sounds are the best sounds!

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes claps his hands and laughs joyfully, surrounded by his loving family in their pajamas. The warm golden hour light creates a perfect lazy Sunday morning scene with newspapers, empty pancake plates, and everyone smiling together.
illustration.alt: Happy Oscar laughing with his family on Sunday morning

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: The pancakes make a sizzling sound when Mama cooks them on the griddle.

questions.question: What does the cat do?
questions.explanation: The happy cat makes purring sounds.

questions.question: How does Oscar feel about the sounds?
choices: He laughs and thinks they're the best!
questions.explanation: Oscar giggles and thinks home sounds are the best sounds!
